name: @absolutejs/wallet-stripe
description: Stripe Checkout funding, verified webhook normalization, refunds, and dispute actions for @absolutejs/wallet.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bun build src/index.ts --root ./src --outdir dist --sourcemap --target=bun --external stripe && tsc --project tsconfig.build.json
scripts.check:package: bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run build
